seo.title: Night Shift Care Staff London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Vigil Care Staffing supplies CQC-compliant, fully vetted night shift care staff across London for care homes, hospitals, supported living, and private residences.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.sub: Alert, dependable night-shift care workers supplied across Greater London — healthcare assistants, support workers, and specialist night staff.
fields.heading: Night Shift Care Staff in London
fields.image_alt: Agency night care worker checking on residents during a night shift in London

fields.body: Nights bring their own demands. Residents may need help settling, regular checks, and calm reassurance in the small hours, and a service is often running on a smaller team. Vigil Care Staffing supplies vetted night-shift care workers to care providers across Greater London. Our night workers are experienced in the rhythm of overnight care, quiet, attentive, and ready to respond when needed. We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, and specialist night staff for care homes, supported living, and private residences. From covering a single night to filling a longer run of shifts, we match reliable workers to your rota so overnight care stays safe and consistent.
fields.heading: Dependable cover through the night

items.body: Our night workers understand overnight care, from settling routines and regular checks to responding calmly when a resident needs help.
items.title: Specialist Night Experience

items.body: When a night shift falls through, we work quickly to place a suitable, vetted worker from our Greater London pool.
items.title: Rapid Cover

items.body: Our workers are based across Greater London, which helps us reach your service and provide staff familiar with local care settings.
items.title: Borough-Wide Availability

items.body: Every night worker is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced before placement.
items.title: Fully Vetted Night Staff

items.body: Book a single night, a block of nights, or ongoing overnight cover while you recruit, with arrangements that flex around your rota.
items.title: Flexible Options

items.body: Consistent, prepared workers keep handovers simple and help residents feel settled through the night.
items.title: Reduced Disruption

fields.body: Overnight shifts often run with fewer people on site, so the workers we supply must be dependable and properly checked. Before any night placement, we complete enhanced DBS checks, verify right to work, and take up professional references. We assess relevant skills for the role, and because our workers are directly employed we keep training and documentation current. Our recruitment follows a CQC-compliant process, so night cover meets the same standard as any daytime placement.
fields.heading: Vetting and compliance for overnight placements
fields.image_alt: Night shift care worker assisting a resident quietly during the night in a London care home

items.a: Yes. We supply night-shift care workers across Greater London, whether you need cover for a single night or a longer run of shifts.
items.q: Do you supply staff for night shifts only?

items.a: We supply healthcare assistants, support workers, and specialist night staff for overnight cover, matched to the needs of your setting.
They are. Every night worker is DBS-checked, right-to-work verified, and referenced before placement.
items.q: Are night workers vetted to the same standard?

items.a: We prioritise urgent requests and work to place a suitable night worker as quickly as we can, and we will be clear about timing.
items.q: Can you provide night cover at short notice?

items.a: We provide night-shift staff for care homes, supported living services, and private residences across Greater London.
